models.candidateReason: Fast 3B local model evaluated for decomposed editorial work.
knownStrengths: 18/18 narrow calls returned parseable JSON without retry
100% exact source-path precision
Fast narrow extraction average of 1.89 seconds
knownWeaknesses: Only 25% of evidence excerpts matched source text exactly
Only one valid grounded signal across 18 narrow calls
Prompt echo during broad ranking
80-word malformed long-form draft

models.candidateReason: Very small, GGUF, Apache-2.0, LFM2 architecture.
knownStrengths: Tiny footprint for naming and labeling tasks
LFM2 lineage aligned with existing LiquidAI candidates
knownWeaknesses: Experimental release; not yet evaluated in LocAIly fixtures

models.candidateReason: Reduces prompt size before routing to small models.
models.runtimeNotes: Seq2seq compression model (~60M params). May require llama.cpp or a dedicated adapter rather than standard Ollama chat routing.
knownStrengths: Targets sub-100ms preprocessing for short prompts
Designed to preserve intent while trimming tokens
knownWeaknesses: Not a general LLM; integration path into Pit Crew router is unproven

models.runtimeNotes: Vision-language OCR model. Requires text GGUF plus mmproj; llama.cpp is the primary path today. Ollama support is still maturing.
knownStrengths: Strong document parsing benchmark scores on OmniDocBench
Compact VL footprint for local OCR lanes
knownWeaknesses: Multi-file VL runtime setup
Not yet wired into LocAIly orchestration

models.candidateReason: Gives LocAIly visual understanding without jumping to cloud vision.
models.runtimeNotes: Requires text GGUF plus mmproj-fp16. Prefer llama.cpp for reliable vision inference; Ollama multimodal support varies by build.
knownStrengths: General-purpose local vision lane at 2B scale
Useful for UI and screenshot reasoning beyond OCR-only tasks
knownWeaknesses: Higher memory footprint than OCR-only models
Vision routing not implemented in Local Brain yet

models.candidateReason: Strong fit for Lighthouse Handoff and developer workflows.
knownStrengths: Dense 0.8B coding model with reasoning on Qwen3 platform
Fast draft generation for developer-facing tracks
knownWeaknesses: Not yet benchmarked on Lighthouse Handoff fixtures
Coding-specific; may need validators for factual handoff content
